rules.rule_text:
title: Vertex RAT
id: 369292df-dfe7-462d-b6ab-4b2d540850aa
description: Patterns observed in Vertex RAT C2 traffic
status: test
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
date: 2025-11-25
references:
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/357f209134726e0f42febd8edb0babed6925489255746022e20df2e79ecf9a0d/behavior
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection_uri:
    cs-uri-stem|endswith:
    - /tasks.php
    - /adduser.php
    cs-uri-query|contains:
    - uid=
    - lan=
    - cmpname=
  selection_agent:
    cs-user-agent|cased: V32
  condition: 1 of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
